issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnBlock' (Blocker keyword with 'On Your Opponent's Attack'), not 'OnAttacked'
Condition is 'Always' but text requires 'you only have Characters with a type including GERMA' — needs custom condition checking board state
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect — text says 'trash 2 cards from the top of your deck' (deck trash, not hand). Should be 'ForceDiscard' with source 'Deck' or similar deck-specific action
Filter object empty — trashing from deck should specify 'FromTop' or deck-specific source, not hand filter
'Once Per Turn' effect limiter not modeled in DSL structure

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Blocker]
[On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] This effect can be activated when you only have Characters with a type including "GERMA". Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this battle. Then, trash 2 cards from the top of your deck.
